economic_notes: Simpcw Resources LLP engaged in logging operations and environmental contract work with revenues of $35,752,087. Planning underway for new multi-purpose facility budgeted at $16,530,000. Subsequent event: $2,500,000 capacity funding from Ministry of Forests for forestry and stewardship opportunities.
notes: Fiscal year 2020. Simpcw Resources LLP (99.99% owned) accounted for by modified equity method as a GBE; contributed $5,202,238 income to consolidated results. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Simpcw Holdings Limited and Simpcw Resources Ltd. Auditor's report includes COVID-19 uncertainty paragraph noting inability to estimate pandemic impact on future operations. Christine Donald and Alison Green listed both as Councillors and receiving wages - dual remuneration included. Subsequent event: $2.5M capacity funding received after year end. Long-term debt consists of term loans ($13,154) and mortgages payable ($157,378). Expenses_salaries_total taken from segmented statement wages and benefits line for 2020.
